definition.description: Specifies the schema definition, provided as a JSON or Avro schema string, to define the structure of the Pub/Sub messages.

name.description: Specifies the name of the Pub/Sub schema, must be unique within the project.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration for create, update, and delete operations on the Pub/Sub schema. Ensure the specified time is sufficient for the operation to complete.

type.description: Defines the type of schema, either AVRO, PROTOCOL_BUF, or JSON, determining the format of the messages.
